title: Samdhin Heat Wave
lead: A critical heat wave is affecting Samdhin with a Z-Score of +5.40. Temperatures are extremely high, reaching a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Samdhin is causing significant discomfort with high temperatures and low humidity at 33%. 
 The wind speed is relatively low at 6.3 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 Cooling degree days (CDD) are at 17.9 GG, while heating degree days (HDD) are at 0.0 GG, indicating extreme heat.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
